text: Adobe continues to maintain strong market positioning across multiple segments, recognized as a leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant evaluation alongside Shopify, Wix, Oracle, and Square [C003]. The company is also featured prominently in the Web Conferencing Market Report and Forecast 2025-2034, which projects the global web conferencing market will expand at a compound annual growth rate of 8.40% from 2025 to 2034 [C012]. A bullish thesis published on Rebound Capital's Substack noted Adobe's trailing and forward P/E ratios at 22.89 and 15.41 respectively as of mid-August, suggesting potential valuation attractiveness for growth investors [C011].
